name: Flashcat
description: Open-source cloud-native monitoring platform with alerting, dashboards and on-call based on Nightingale and Categraf.

seo.title: Flashcat — Observability / Logging / Tracing
seo.meta_description: Flashcat: Open-source cloud-native monitoring platform with alerting, dashboards and on-call based on Nightingale and Categraf.

when_to_use: Open-source cloud-native alerting with Prometheus rules
On-call management integrated with Nightingale dashboards
Categraf agent collecting metrics from 100+ sources
Alert deduplication and silence rules for noisy infra

pros: Nightingale + Categraf stack with managed UI
cons: Docs and UI primarily Chinese first
Smaller global community than Grafana stack
Feature parity gaps vs Grafana Cloud
review.verdict: Solid open-core stack popular in China, but language and community barriers limit global adoption.
review.best_for: APAC teams wanting a managed Nightingale/Categraf platform with Chinese support.
review.not_for: Global teams preferring English-first tooling or Grafana ecosystem.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium tier; no explicit peak-lock or reserved-capacity evidence.
